title: Grid
description: Network composed of two or more sets of curves in which the members of each set intersect the members of the other sets in an algorithmic way.

definitions.definition: Network composed of two or more sets of curves in which the members of each set intersect the members of the other sets in an algorithmic way.
definitions.notes:
- The curves partition a space into grid cells or zones.
- The intersection points of the curves are called nodes.
